title: Point Calimere Wildlife and Bird Sanctuary
tagline: Point Calimere Wildlife and Bird Sanctuary — wildlife reserve of Tamil Nadu

heroImage.alt: Point Calimere Wildlife and Bird Sanctuary, Tamil Nadu

overview.short: Point Calimere Wildlife and Bird Sanctuary is a protected area in Tamil Nadu, South India, covering 21.47 km2 (8.29 sq mi) along the Palk Strait where it meets the Bay of Bengal at
overview.description: Point Calimere Wildlife and Bird Sanctuary is a protected area in Tamil Nadu, South India, covering 21.47 km2 (8.29 sq mi) along the Palk Strait where it meets the Bay of Bengal at Point Calimere at the southeastern tip of Nagapattinam District. It was created in 1967 for the conservation of the blackbuck and also hosts large congregations of waterbirds, especially greater flamingos. It has been classified as an Important Bird Area.

topPlaces.name: Kodi Kuzhagar Temple
topPlaces.description: Kuzhagar Temple or Kodi Kuzhagar Temple (கோடிக் குழகர் கோயில்) (also called Amrithakadeswarar Temple) is a Hindu temple dedicated to Shiva, located in the town of Kodikkarai in Tamil Nadu, India. Kuzhagar is revered in the 7th century Tamil Saiva canonical work, the Tevaram, written by Tamil saint poets known as the nayanars and classified as Paadal Petra Sthalam.

topPlaces.name: Point Calimere
topPlaces.description: Point Calimere, also called Cape Calimere or Kodiakkarai, is a low headland of the Coromandel Coast, in the Nagapattinam district of the Indian state of Tamil Nadu. The Cape is located about 9 kilometres (5.6 mi) south of Vedaranyam in the Kaveri delta, and marks a nearly right-angle turn in the coastline.

topPlaces.name: Agastheeswarar Temple
topPlaces.description: Agastheeswarar Temple (அகஸ்தீஸ்வரர் கோயில்) is a Hindu temple dedicated to Shiva, located in the town of Agasthiyampalli, Nagapattinam district in Tamil Nadu, India. The presiding deity is revered in the seventh century Tamil Saiva canonical work, the Tevaram, written by Tamil saint poets known as the nayanmars and classified as Paadal Petra Sthalam.

topPlaces.name: Vedaranyeswarar Temple
topPlaces.description: Vedaranyeswarar Temple is a Hindu temple dedicated to the god Shiva, located in the town of Vedaranyam in Tamil Nadu, India. Vedaranyeswarar is revered in the 7th-century-CE Tamil Shaiva canonical work, the Tevaram, written by Tamil saint poets known as the Nayanars and classified as Paadal Petra Sthalam.

topPlaces.name: Vedaranyam taluk
topPlaces.description: Vedaranyam taluk is a taluk of Nagapattinam district of the Indian state of Tamil Nadu.

topPlaces.name: Vedaranyam block
topPlaces.description: Vedaranyam block is a revenue block in Nagapattinam district, Tamil Nadu, India. There are a total of 36 panchayat villages in this block.

topPlaces.name: Vedaranyam
topPlaces.description: Vedaranyam (Tamil: [ʋeːdaːɾaɳjam]) (also spelt as Vedaraniam and Vedaranniyam) is a town in Nagapattinam district in the Indian state of Tamil Nadu. The town is named after the presiding deity of the Vedaranyeswarar Temple.

topPlaces.name: Adhanur, Thanjavur
topPlaces.description: Adhanur is a village in the Vedaranyam taluk of Nagapattinam district, Tamil Nadu, India.

items.note: Kuzhagar Temple or Kodi Kuzhagar Temple (கோடிக் குழகர் கோயில்) (also called Amrithakadeswarar Temple) is a Hindu temple dedicated to Shiva, located in the town of Kodikkarai in Tamil Nadu, India. Kuzhagar is revered in the 7th century Tamil Saiva canonical work, the Tevaram, written by Tamil saint poets known as the nayanars and classified as Paadal Petra Sthalam.

Point Calimere, also called Cape Calimere or Kodiakkarai, is a low headland of the Coromandel Coast, in the Nagapattinam district of the Indian state of Tamil Nadu. The Cape is located about 9 kilometres (5.6 mi) south of Vedaranyam in the Kaveri delta, and marks a nearly right-angle turn in the coastline.

Agastheeswarar Temple (அகஸ்தீஸ்வரர் கோயில்) is a Hindu temple dedicated to Shiva, located in the town of Agasthiyampalli, Nagapattinam district in Tamil Nadu, India. The presiding deity is revered in the seventh century Tamil Saiva canonical work, the Tevaram, written by Tamil saint poets known as the nayanmars and classified as Paadal Petra Sthalam.

Vedaranyeswarar Temple is a Hindu temple dedicated to the god Shiva, located in the town of Vedaranyam in Tamil Nadu, India. Vedaranyeswarar is revered in the 7th-century-CE Tamil Shaiva canonical work, the Tevaram, written by Tamil saint poets known as the Nayanars and classified as Paadal Petra Sthalam.
Vedaranyam taluk is a taluk of Nagapattinam district of the Indian state of Tamil Nadu.
Vedaranyam block is a revenue block in Nagapattinam district, Tamil Nadu, India. There are a total of 36 panchayat villages in this block.

Vedaranyam (Tamil: [ʋeːdaːɾaɳjam]) (also spelt as Vedaraniam and Vedaranniyam) is a town in Nagapattinam district in the Indian state of Tamil Nadu. The town is named after the presiding deity of the Vedaranyeswarar Temple.
Adhanur is a village in the Vedaranyam taluk of Nagapattinam district, Tamil Nadu, India.

faq.q: What is the best time to visit Point Calimere Wildlife and Bird Sanctuary?
faq.a: The best time to visit Point Calimere Wildlife and Bird Sanctuary is Nov – Feb. Summers are 26–36°C and winters are 22–32°C.

faq.q: How do I reach Point Calimere Wildlife and Bird Sanctuary?
faq.a: The nearest airport is Tiruchirappalli International Airport (136 km) and the nearest railway station is Tiruchirappalli Junction (139 km). Roads are generally good; check seasonal/monsoon conditions before high-altitude or remote stretches.

faq.q: How many days are enough for Point Calimere Wildlife and Bird Sanctuary?
faq.a: 3 days are usually enough to cover the top attractions of Point Calimere Wildlife and Bird Sanctuary at a relaxed pace.

faq.q: How much does a hotel cost in Point Calimere Wildlife and Bird Sanctuary?
faq.a: Stays in Point Calimere Wildlife and Bird Sanctuary start from ₹2,500 per night, with options across 5 price categories.

faq.q: What are the top places to visit in Point Calimere Wildlife and Bird Sanctuary?
faq.a: The top attractions are Kodi Kuzhagar Temple, Point Calimere, Agastheeswarar Temple, Vedaranyeswarar Temple, Vedaranyam taluk.
